items.title: ‘Fuck you, Bambu’: How one private message could change the face of 3D printing
items.description: Bambu Lab makes the best, most accessible 3D printers yet, but that reputation is suddenly under siege. It all started when Paweł Jarczak received a private message from the company on Reddit asking him to delete his code. Now the 3D printing community is lining up behind Jarczak to fund a war again...
